'''鈭歴-p-th-m''' ('''kasapthemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoscore|immunoscore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoscore|immunoscore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-p-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasapthemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisapthemoko|thisapthemoko]] || [[word:jisapthemoko|jisapthemoko]] || [[word:shisapthemoko|shisapthemoko]] || [[word:kisapthemoko|kisapthemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusapthemoko|thuthusapthemoko]] || [[word:jujusapthemoko|jujusapthemoko]] || [[word:shushusapthemoko|shushusapthemoko]] || [[word:kukusapthemoko|kukusapthemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusapthemoko|thusapthemoko]] || [[word:jusapthemoko|jusapthemoko]] || [[word:shusapthemoko|shusapthemoko]] || [[word:kusapthemoko|kusapthemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosapthemoko|thothosapthemoko]] || [[word:jojosapthemoko|jojosapthemoko]] || [[word:shoshosapthemoko|shoshosapthemoko]] || [[word:kokosapthemoko|kokosapthemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosapthemoko|thosapthemoko]] || [[word:josapthemoko|josapthemoko]] || [[word:shosapthemoko|shosapthemoko]] || [[word:kosapthemoko|kosapthemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosapthemoko|thosapthemoko]] || [[word:josapthemoko|josapthemoko]] || [[word:shosapthemoko|shosapthemoko]] || [[word:kosapthemoko|kosapthemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sapthemoko|th忙sapthemoko]] || [[word:j忙sapthemoko|j忙sapthemoko]] || [[word:sh忙sapthemoko|sh忙sapthemoko]] || [[word:k忙sapthemoko|k忙sapthemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasapthemoko|thathasapthemoko]] || [[word:jajasapthemoko|jajasapthemoko]] || [[word:shashasapthemoko|shashasapthemoko]] || [[word:kakasapthemoko|kakasapthemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasapthemoko|thasapthemoko]] || [[word:jasapthemoko|jasapthemoko]] || [[word:shasapthemoko|shasapthemoko]] || [[word:kasapthemoko|kasapthemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasapthemoko|thasapthemoko]] || [[word:jasapthemoko|jasapthemoko]] || [[word:shasapthemoko|shasapthemoko]] || [[word:kasapthemoko|kasapthemoko]]
|}
